subject: infra(deploy): migrate from GitHub Actions/Pages to Vercel
body:
GitHub Pages had friction for SPAs: subpath base config, manual source
setting, no env var injection, and 404.html copy hack for client-side
routing. Vercel handles all of this natively.

Changes:
- Delete .github/workflows/deploy.yml (GitHub Actions workflow)
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrites (replaces 404.html hack)
- Remove base: '/graphiki/' from vite.config.ts (Vercel serves at root)
- Update decision comments in vite.config.ts, main.tsx, debugLog.ts,
  DebugPill.tsx to reference Vercel instead of GitHub Pages
- Add deployment convention and Vercel Migration milestone to CLAUDE.md
- Add Vercel Migration entry to docs/HISTORY.md

Tags: infrastructure, vercel, deployment, migration
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: minor
